MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF EMPIRE ENTERPRISES, A CALIF GENERAL PARTNERSHIP SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR AUG-25-1993 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01 SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON AUG-30-1993 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HOEVET, JO DONNA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 155 HYDE STREET APT. #202 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., STAYED UNTIL SEP-12-1993, LEASE FORFEITED, SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE CREDITED OR RETURNED TO DEFT JO DONNA HOEVET UPON INSPECTION OF PREMISE AFTER DEFT. VACATES LESS ANY DAMAGE BEYOND NORMAL WEAR AND TEAR.

EMPIRE ENTERPRISES ADAM BARASCH, ESQ. VS. LAW OFFICE OF STEVEN E. LITTMAN JO DONNA HOEVET, ET IN PRO PER AL. 3:30 P.M. C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE. ALL PARTIES AND COUNSEL PRESENT, EXCEPT PLAINTIFF. CASE SETTLED BY ADAM BARASCH, ESQ. SPECIALLY APPEARING FOR ATTORNEY STEVEN E. LITTMAN. STIPULATED JUDGMENT IN FAVOR OF PLTF. AGAINST DEFT. JO DONNA HOVET FOR RESTITUTION OF 155 HYDE STREET #202 SAN FRANCISCO, CA. AND FORFEITURE OF THE LEASE AGREEMENT. PLTF. AWARDED $1,361.38 PAST DUE RENTS AND DAMAGES. WRIT TO ISSUE FORTHWITH, STAY PHYSICAL EVICTION TO AND INCLUDING 5:00 P.M. 9/12/93. ATTORNEY FEES AND COST WAIVED. SECURITY DEPOSIT TO BE CREDITED TOWARD THE MONEY JUDGMENT AFTER ANY DEDUCTION IS TAKEN FOR DAMAGE TO THE PREMISE BEYOND NORMAL WEAR AND TEAR. PRO TEM JUDGE MATTHEW WHITE. REPORTER, JOHN LEWIS.
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
